title: MASH Payment System - Full Capability Implementation
description: Complete payment system with PayMongo integration (GCash, GrabPay, Credit/Debit Cards, PayMaya), COD, and full checkout UI/UX redesign for the MASH e-commerce platform.

stories.title: Payment Schema & Type System Foundation
acceptanceCriteria: Update checkout-schemas.ts: step3Schema paymentMethod enum includes 'cod', 'gcash', 'grab_pay', 'card', 'paymaya'
Create PaymentContext with state: selectedMethod, paymentStatus, paymentId, checkoutUrl, error
Add PaymentMethod, PaymentState, PaymentAction types to src/types/payment.ts
Add Zod runtime validation for payment API responses
All existing tests pass after changes

stories.title: PayMongo Environment Configuration & Validation
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/payment/config.ts with centralized payment config
Environment variable validation on app startup (warn if keys missing)
Payment feature flags: PAYMONGO_ENABLED derived from env vars
Graceful fallback to COD-only mode when PayMongo not configured
Add payment config documentation in .github/PAYMENT_SYSTEM_GUIDE.md
Build passes with all changes

stories.title: Payment Method Selection UI Component
acceptanceCriteria: Create PaymentMethodSelector component with radio card design
Display available methods: COD, GCash, GrabPay, Credit/Debit Card, PayMaya
Each method shows icon/logo, name, and brief description
Disabled state for methods when PayMongo not configured (shows 'Coming Soon')
Selected method has emerald/green highlight border
Responsive: stacked on mobile, 2-column grid on desktop
Keyboard accessible with proper ARIA attributes
Loading skeleton state implemented
COD always available as fallback

stories.title: GCash Payment Flow - Frontend Integration
acceptanceCriteria: GCash option in PaymentMethodSelector shows GCash logo and description
On selection: show inline info box explaining redirect to GCash app
Place Order button text changes to 'Pay with GCash' when selected
After clicking: show processing overlay with spinner and 'Redirecting to GCash...'
Handle redirect back: payment-success page verifies GCash payment via API
Handle redirect back: payment-failed page shows retry option
Mobile-optimized: GCash deep link for mobile users when available

stories.title: GrabPay Payment Flow - Frontend Integration
acceptanceCriteria: GrabPay option in PaymentMethodSelector shows GrabPay logo and description
On selection: show inline info box explaining redirect to Grab app
Place Order button text changes to 'Pay with GrabPay'
Processing overlay: 'Redirecting to GrabPay...'
Handles success/failure redirect correctly
Shares PaymentProcessingOverlay component with GCash flow

stories.title: Credit/Debit Card Payment UI - Card Input Form
acceptanceCriteria: Create CardPaymentForm component with card number, expiry, CVC fields
Card number field: auto-format with spaces (4242 4242 4242 4242), detect card type icon
Expiry field: MM/YY auto-format with slash
CVC field: 3-4 digits, masked input
Real-time validation with error messages (invalid card, expired, etc.)
Visa/Mastercard logo detection based on card number prefix
Secure input: no autocomplete, paste support, keyboard navigation
3D Secure handling: redirect to bank verification then back
WCAG AA accessible: labels, error announcements, focus management

stories.title: PayMaya Payment Flow - Frontend Integration
acceptanceCriteria: PayMaya/Maya option in PaymentMethodSelector shows PayMaya logo
On selection: info box explaining redirect to Maya app
Button text: 'Pay with Maya'
Processing overlay: 'Redirecting to Maya...'
Handles success/failure redirect correctly
Shares PaymentProcessingOverlay with e-wallet flows

stories.title: Checkout Step 3 - Payment Integration Rewrite
acceptanceCriteria: CheckoutStep3Payment integrates PaymentMethodSelector component
Dynamic content based on selected payment method (COD info, card form, e-wallet redirect)
Place Order button text dynamically reflects payment method
Order review section shows selected payment method with icon
Smooth transitions between payment method details (duration-200)
Form validation: payment method required before submit
Disabled state during payment processing
Error display for payment failures with retry option

stories.title: Payment API Route - Create Payment Intent/Source
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/payment/create-intent handles all payment methods correctly
E-wallet methods (gcash, grab_pay, paymaya) create PayMongo sources
Card method creates PayMongo payment intent
COD method returns success without PayMongo call
Request validation with Zod schema
Error responses with user-friendly messages
Rate limiting headers included
All payment types return consistent PaymentResult shape

stories.title: Payment Status Polling & Verification API
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/payment/status?paymentId=X&type=source|intent returns current status
Polling endpoint for frontend to check payment completion
Returns: { status, paid, paymentId, method }
Handles both source status (e-wallets) and intent status (cards)
Timeout handling: return 'pending' after 5 min with retry suggestion
No sensitive data exposed in response

stories.title: Webhook Handler - Enhanced Event Processing
acceptanceCriteria: Webhook handles all PayMongo events: source.chargeable, payment.paid, payment.failed, payment_intent.succeeded, payment_intent.payment_failed
Updates Firebase order payment status on each event
Sends order confirmation email on successful payment
Logs all webhook events for debugging
Signature verification enforced in production
Idempotent: duplicate webhook calls don't create duplicate actions
Returns 200 OK for all valid events (even if processing fails)

stories.title: Checkout Flow - Payment Processing Integration
acceptanceCriteria: Checkout page handlePlaceOrder creates order then initiates payment
COD orders: create order with status 'pending_payment' and payment 'cod'
E-wallet orders: create order, call /api/payment/create-intent, redirect to checkoutUrl
Card orders: create order, create payment intent, show 3DS form or redirect
Store pending order data in sessionStorage for redirect returns
Handle payment failures: show error toast, allow retry without recreating order
Loading states: 'Creating Order...' then 'Processing Payment...'
Cart cleared only after confirmed payment (not on order creation)

stories.title: Payment Success Page - Enhanced Verification
acceptanceCriteria: Payment success page verifies payment via /api/payment/status on mount
Shows: order number, payment method used, amount paid, estimated delivery
Success animation: checkmark with subtle scale + fade-in
CTA buttons: View Order, Continue Shopping, Download Receipt (future)
Auto-clears cart after verified successful payment
Sends order confirmation email if not already sent by webhook
Handles edge case: user lands here but payment not yet confirmed (polling)
Responsive design: clean layout on mobile and desktop

stories.title: Payment Failed Page - Retry & Recovery
acceptanceCriteria: Payment failed page shows clear error message
Shows: order number, payment method attempted, failure reason if available
CTA buttons: Try Again (back to checkout step 3), Choose Different Method, Contact Support
Try Again preserves order data (don't require re-entering info)
Error illustration or icon with empathetic message
Link to FAQ/help for common payment issues
Responsive design matching success page layout

stories.title: Order Summary Component - Payment Details Display
acceptanceCriteria: OrderSummary shows payment method with icon in checkout
Payment method name displayed: 'Cash on Delivery', 'GCash', 'GrabPay', 'Credit/Debit Card', 'Maya'
Subtotal, delivery fee, service fee, and total with proper formatting (PHP currency)
Expandable/collapsible item list on mobile
Payment security badge: 'Secured by PayMongo' for digital payments
Promotional banner for digital payment discounts (future-ready slot)

stories.title: Order History - Payment Status Display
acceptanceCriteria: Order history cards show payment method icon and name
Payment status badge: Paid (green), Pending (yellow), Failed (red), Refunded (blue)
Order detail page shows full payment info: method, transaction ID, paid date
COD orders show 'Pay on Delivery/Pickup' status
Digital payment orders show PayMongo transaction reference
Filter orders by payment status in order history

stories.title: Payment Processing Overlay & Loading States
acceptanceCriteria: Full-screen overlay during payment processing with blur backdrop
Animated spinner with payment method logo
Progress text: 'Creating your order...', 'Connecting to payment...', 'Redirecting...'
Cancel option with confirmation dialog after 30 seconds
Prevent accidental page navigation during payment (beforeunload event)
Timeout handler: show 'Taking longer than expected' after 60 seconds
Accessible: sr-only live region announces status changes

stories.title: Payment Logos & Brand Assets
acceptanceCriteria: Payment method logos in public/payment-logos/ directory: gcash.svg, grabpay.svg, visa.svg, mastercard.svg, maya.svg, cod-icon.svg
SVG logos optimized (under 5KB each)
PaymentLogo component renders correct logo by payment method type
Dark mode compatible logos (or dual versions)
Footer payment methods strip showing accepted payment methods
Checkout page payment logos in proper sizes

stories.title: Unit Tests - Payment Components & API Routes
acceptanceCriteria: Tests for PaymentMethodSelector: renders all methods, selection works, disabled states
Tests for CardPaymentForm: validation, formatting, error display
Tests for PaymentProcessingOverlay: shows correct text per state
Tests for PaymentLogo: renders correct logo per method
Tests for /api/payment/create-intent: all payment methods, validation errors
Tests for /api/payment/status: source and intent status checks
Tests for /api/payment/webhook: all event types, signature verification
Tests for checkout-schemas: all payment method values validate
Tests for PaymentContext: state management, actions
All 265+ existing test suites still pass
Minimum 80% coverage on new payment files

stories.title: End-to-End Integration & Polish
acceptanceCriteria: Full checkout flow works: Cart -> Step 1 (Delivery) -> Step 2 (Contact) -> Step 3 (Payment) -> Order Created
COD flow: place order completes immediately with success modal
GCash flow: redirect to GCash, return to success page, order updated
GrabPay flow: redirect to GrabPay, return to success page, order updated
Card flow: inline form, 3DS redirect if needed, order updated
PayMaya flow: redirect to Maya, return to success page, order updated
Error recovery: failed payment allows retry from step 3
Order confirmation email sent for all successful payments
All UI components responsive at 320px, 768px, 1024px, 1440px
npm run build passes with zero errors
npm run lint passes with zero warnings
npm run test passes with all suites (265+)
No TypeScript 'any' types in payment code
